_comment: FIXTURE - a Myth-tiered world-state record. BOO G's shop transforms into a shrine as Myth rises. Stable state keys, thresholds, and the telemetry that fires on each transition. This is data the world-state system reads; no logic here.

tiers.label: B's Hits Shop
tiers.description: A normal shop. Boo G sells; nothing watches back.

tiers.label: B's Hits (warming)
tiers.description: Offerings appear among the goods. The myth is starting to stick.

tiers.label: Shrine of B
tiers.description: The shop is a shrine. Prices are tribute; Boo G speaks like a thing remembered.
